ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "ms_subclass" INTEGER /* MSSubClass code indicating property type */,
  "ms_zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  "lot_frontage" REAL /* Frontage of the lot in feet */,
  "lot_area" REAL /* Total area of the lot in square feet */,
  "street" TEXT /* Type of street access */,
  "alley" TEXT /* Alley access details */,
  "lot_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the lot */,
  "land_contour" TEXT /* Contour of the land */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* More detailed property type (e.g., single-family, townhouse, condo) */,
  "construction_material" TEXT /* Material used in the construction of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Overall condition of the property */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Current estimated value of the property */,
  "last_audited" TEXT /* Date of the last property audit or inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_details" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property it belongs to */,
  "bldg_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., single family, multi-family) */,
  "house_style" TEXT /* Style of the house */,
  "overall_qual" INTEGER /* Overall quality rating */,
  "overall_cond" INTEGER /* Overall condition rating */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "year_remod_add" INTEGER /* Year of the last remodel */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof */,
  "roof_style" TEXT /* Style of the roof (e.g., gable, hip) */,
  "exterior_finishing" TEXT /* Type of exterior finishing (e.g., brick, siding) */,
  "interior_finishing" TEXT /* Type of interior finishing (e.g., hardwood, carpet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_details_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price at which the property was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale transaction */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of sale */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month of sale */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year of sale */,
  "sale_duration" INTEGER /* Duration the property was on the market before sale */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing agent */,
  "buying_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buying agent */,
  "sale_source" TEXT /* Source of the sale (e.g., MLS, private sale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_history_buying_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("buying_agent_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_history_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income level in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* Average property value in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Availability and quality of public transportation */,
  "school_quality" TEXT /* Quality of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "parking_options" TEXT /* Availability of parking options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property it belongs to */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "garage_yr_blt" INTEGER /* Year the garage was built */,
  "garage_finish" TEXT /* Finish of the garage */,
  "garage_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars that can fit in the garage */,
  "garage_area" REAL /* Area of the garage in square feet */,
  "deck_area" REAL /* Area of the deck in square feet */,
  "deck_material" TEXT /* Material of the deck */,
  "patio_area" REAL /* Area of the patio in square feet */,
  "patio_material" TEXT /* Material of the patio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "pool_area" REAL /* Area of the pool in square feet */,
  "pool_qc" TEXT /* Quality of the pool */,
  "fence" TEXT /* Type of fencing */,
  "misc_feature" TEXT /* Miscellaneous feature details */,
  "misc_val" REAL /* Value of miscellaneous feature */,
  "spa_area" REAL /* Area of the spa or hot tub in square feet */,
  "spa_type" TEXT /* Type of spa or hot tub */,
  "garden_area" REAL /* Area of the garden in square feet */,
  "garden_type" TEXT /* Type of garden (e.g., vegetable, flower) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basement_info" (
  "basement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for basement entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "bsmt_qual" TEXT /* Quality of the basement */,
  "bsmt_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the basement */,
  "bsmt_exposure" TEXT /* Exposure type of the basement */,
  "bsmt_fin_type1" TEXT /* Type of finished area in the basement */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf1" REAL /* Square feet of finished area in the basement */,
  "bsmt_fin_type2" TEXT /* Type of second finished area in the basement */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf2" REAL /* Square feet of the second finished area in the basement */,
  "bsmt_unfin_sf" REAL /* Square feet of the unfinished area in the basement */,
  "bsmt_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the basement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_basement_info_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_info" (
  "heating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for heating entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system used */,
  "central_air" TEXT /* Indicates if central air conditioning is available */,
  "electrical" TEXT /* Type of electrical system */,
  "first_flr_sf" REAL /* Square feet of the first floor */,
  "second_flr_sf" REAL /* Square feet of the second floor */,
  "heating_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "cooling_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the cooling system */,
  "energy_star_rating" TEXT /* Energy Star rating of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_info_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms_info" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for room entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated property */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "kitchen_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Number of kitchens above grade */,
  "tot_rms_abv_grd" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms above grade */,
  "num_half_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of half bathrooms in the property */,
  "num_fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces in the property */,
  "fireplace_type" TEXT /* Type of fireplaces (e.g., wood, gas) */,
  "room_features" TEXT /* Any additional features of the rooms (e.g., walk-in closets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_info_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
